title: SortByDigitSum
description:
Given an array of non-negative integers, sort the array in ascending order based on the sum of their digits. If two numbers have the same digit sum, sort them by the integer value itself in ascending order.

Constraints:
- 0 <= nums[i] <= 10^9
- Array length up to 10^5

testCases.description: All same digit sum, sorted by value

hints: Write a helper function to compute the sum of a number's digits.
Use a custom comparator that sorts by digit sum first, then by the number itself.

complexity.explanation: Sorting dominates at O(n log n); computing digit sum for each comparison takes O(d) where d ≤ 10 digits.
